prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为835→5153（异常断档）→1253→1507→1224名；排除2022年异常值后，近4年位次在835–1507之间波动，2025年基准约1224名；本省物理类计划2021–2023年均为19人，2024年20人，2025年18人；2026年计划22人，较2025年扩招4人（+22.2%），扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年升至第42名（2025年第45名），排名稳步提升，财经类院校中位列全国前列；2023年声誉评价曾 因新闻传播学类专业位次下滑被标记为偏负面，但2024–2026年均无负面记录，近年声誉已恢复平稳；抖音热度总排名第97位，评价为“一般”，曝光度中等；应 用经济学为A级学科，理论经济学为A-级学科；统计学类、金融学类、财政学类等物理类招生专业均对应A级学科群，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专 业2024年热度评级为“分化观望”，较此前“明显降温”有所回升；计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业持续高热，可能分流部分物理类高分考生；本省2026年高考总人数约48,000 人；学校位于北京市，一线城市区位优势对西部省份考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1224名处于近年中位水平、2026年计划扩招22.2%使竞争加剧、软科排名提升至42名增强吸引力、本省考生总数基本持平、 工科热门专业分流部分高分考生等因素，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约1367名，区间1162–1572名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1162–1572名内，建议以二档工商管理类（会计学院）和财政学类为主力填报，一档金融学类、经济学类（澄明书院）和大数据管理与应用可冲刺；位次明显优于 区间下限（如1160名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。统计学类虽属三档但热度偏热，实际竞争可能高于预期，需结合当年报考热度灵活调整。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 835 → 5153 (abnormal gap) → 1253 → 1507 → 1224; excluding the 2022 anomaly, the rankings fluctuated between 835 and 1507 in the past 4 years, with a baseline of about 1224 in 2025; the provincial physics category enrollment plan was 19 from 2021 to 2023, 20 in 2024, 18 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22, an increase of 4 (+22.2%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it rose to 42nd (45th in 2025), steadily improving, ranking among the top in finance and economics institutions; in 2023, reputation was marked as slightly negative due to a decline in journalism and communication majors, but from 2024 to 2026, there were no negative records, and reputation has recovered in recent years; Douyin popularity ranks 97th overall, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure; Applied Economics is an A-level discipline, Theoretical Economics is an A- level discipline; Statistics, Finance, and Public Finance majors in the physics category correspond to A-level discipline groups, with strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity rating for finance/finance/economics majors was 'differentiated and wait-and-see', recovering from the previous 'significant cooling'; computer science, electronic information/communication and other engineering majors continue to be highly popular, potentially diverting some high-scoring physics category students; the total number of provincial college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 48,000; the school is located in Beijing, and the first-tier city location advantage strongly attracts students from western provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1224 being at the median level in recent years, the 2026 plan expansion of 22.2% intensifying competition, the Soft Science ranking rising to 42nd enhancing attractiveness, the total number of provincial exam takers remaining basically unchanged, and the diversion of some high-scoring students by popular engineering majors, it is expected that the 2026 minimum ranking will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1367, and a range of 1162–1572.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1162–1572, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Business Administration (Accounting School) and Public Finance as main choices, and consider Tier 1 Finance, Economics (Chengming Academy), and Big Data Management and Application as reach options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1160), you can focus on reaching for top-tier Tier 1 majors. Although Statistics is in Tier 3, it is relatively popular, and actual competition may be higher than expected, so adjust flexibly based on the year's application popularity.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 218 → 267 → 312 → 206 → 349, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 131 places over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking in 2025 is approximately 349, the highest in the past 5 years; the provincial history category enrollment plan was 9 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 11 students, a reduction of 3 students (-21.4%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 42nd (45th in 2025), with a stable upward trend, ranking among the top in the country for finance and economics institutions; in 2023, its reputation evaluation was marked as slightly negative due to a decline in rankings for journalism and communication majors, but from 2024 to 2026, there were no negative records, and its reputation has recovered steadily; its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 97th, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms; Applied Economics is an A-level discipline (top in the country), and Theoretical Economics is an A- level discipline; core enrollment majors such as Finance and Public Finance correspond to the A-level Applied Economics discipline, highlighting strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity rating for finance/economics/economy majors was 'differentiated wait-and-see', recovering from 'significant cooling' in 2022–2023; the total number of provincial college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 48,000, roughly the same as 47,669 in 2025, with little change in competitive pressure; the university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city with obvious locational advantages, strongly attracting candidates from western provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 349 being at a historical high, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 21.4% easing competition, the Soft Science ranking rising to 42nd enhancing attractiveness, and the total number of provincial candidates remaining roughly stable, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 319, and a range of 269–369.

The Law dual degree program offers interdisciplinary advantages and is worth attention.
